title: GIVE YOUR VIEW: A Conservative-run Harrow Council | Bob Blackman
h1: GIVE YOUR VIEW: A Conservative-run Harrow Council
meta_description: The Conservatives took control of Harrow Council in May 2022. Bob is keen to hear your views on how you think it is going, what you would like to see in Harrow and other important topics! You can complete Bob's survey below to take part.
headings: h3: Bob Blackman MP Your Local Voice for Harrow East
text_excerpt: GIVE YOUR VIEW: A Conservative-run Harrow Council | Bob Blackman Skip to main content Main navigation About Bob & Harrow East News & Speeches Subscribe to Bob's e-Newsletter Contact Get Involved! GIVE YOUR VIEW: A Conservative-run Harrow Council Tweet The Conservatives took control of Harrow Council in May 2022. Bob is keen to hear your views on how you think it is going, what you would like to see in Harrow and other important topics! You can complete Bob's survey below to take part. Harrow Residents' Survey Current Survey In order to keep this survey representative: Your details Leave this field blank Are there any issues which need resolving in your local area? Are you aware of the improvements the new Conservative-run Harrow Council is making? Yes No Which of these local matters would you consider to be of most importance to you? (Tick all that apply) Treat our residents and businesses like valued customers and respond to them. Crack down on fly-tipping with improved street cleaning and free bulky waste collections. Introduction of one-hour free parking and expansion to Council-run car parks. Restrict tall buildings in our suburbs and protect the character of our borough. Tackle illegal HMOs and "beds in sheds" by increasing enforcement. Spending your money wisely with no more vanity projects. Which of the Government's five pledges are most important to you? Halve Inflation Grow the Economy Reduce Debt Cut NHS Waiting Lists Stop the Boats Are you in favour of the Mayor of London's ULEZ expansion to the whole of London (including Harrow)? Yes No (Please add my name to your petition against ULEZ) No (I do not wish for my name to be added to your petition against ULEZ) If you live in Harrow East, how well do you think Bob Blackman is doing as your MP? Extremely well Quite well Okay Not very well Badly No opinion Bob Blackman MP Your Local Voice for Harrow East Footer About RSS Accessibility Cookies Privacy About Harrow East Promoted by Zak Wagman on behalf of Bob Blackman, both of HECA, 209 Headstone Lane, Harrow, HA2 6ND.
